attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NBM.PRODUCT_KEY,
AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
AR_TRX_KEY,
NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
SERVICE_FLG,
RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY MDNBT.PROCESS_DATE DESC ) RK,
NBM.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
NBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT, 
NBM.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
NBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
NBM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM (SEL * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE 
	WHERE CANCEL_CODE<>'Lost Order' AND BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY >0
	AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0
	AND BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP' 
	AND EDW_CREATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
	)NBM
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX MDNBT
ON MDNBT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH  /* added 13-08 */
ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   =   RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <>  'WW Distribution'

SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE,
FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
FROM 
$$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX
